productDisplayName: Timberland Men Casual Blue Casual Shoes
description: Trendy and comfortable, the timberland 2.0 Euro Hiker Sprint shoe comes in a classic design and is packed with features that makes it much more than just a footwear -  a perfect buy for those men who never compromise on comfort and style. This is one classic hiking boot that works great for winter vacations. UpperSuede upper for absolute durability, comfort and styleHi-ankle for comfort and styleSynthetic leather lining along the collarFabric inner lining with a well-padded collar and tongue for ultimate breathable comfortStylish lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Brand badge on lateral heel with embroidered branding on lateral forefoot and tongue for styleMidsoleSmart Comfort Biorhythmic Chassis channels to offer comfort where it's most needed Has contoured cushioning on the heel, pressure relief on the big toe mound and energy return in the toe region for absolute comfort when walking on hard and rough terrainOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with terraced lugs for ultimate grip and tractionOutsole reinforced on the upper as toe box foxing for durabilityShoe careUse a suede brush to clean the upperDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
